display.text:
model: gemma-4-26b
task: generate_mujoco_xml

instructions: |
  Generate a valid MuJoCo XML model of a simple ideal pendulum using SI units.

  Coordinate system:
    +x = right
    +y = upward
    +z = out of page

  Pendulum definition:
    - Massless rod
    - Spherical bob
    - Single hinge joint

  Joint specifications:
    - Type: hinge
    - Location: [0, 1, 0]
    - Axis: [0, 0, 1]
    - Damping: 0
    - Friction: 0
    - No losses

  Rod:
    - Length: 0.2485 m
    - Mass: 0
    - Collision: disabled

  Bob:
    - Shape: sphere
    - Diameter: 0.1 m
    - Mass: 1.0 kg

  Environment:
    - Gravity: [0, -9.81, 0]

  Initial conditions:
    - Pendulum starts horizontal
    - Bob positioned along +x from hinge
    - Initial angle: +90 degrees from vertical
    - Initial angular velocity: 0 rad/s

  MuJoCo requirements:
    - Enable energy computation
    - Exactly one hinge joint
    - Joint rotates only about z-axis
    - Use SI units

  Acceptance criteria:
    - Exactly one hinge joint
    - Rod length = 0.2485 m
    - Rod mass = 0 kg
    - Bob mass = 1 kg
    - Gravity = [0, -9.81, 0]
    - Initial angle = +90 degrees
    - Initial angular velocity = 0
    - Energy computation enabled

output_format:
  type: xml
  constraints:
    - Return only valid MuJoCo XML
    - No explanations
    - No additional text

state.title: YAML_creation/Temperature_Testing/V4_Temp_0.7/test07/ChatGPT-5.3-Instant_Pend.YAML

input.content:
<mujoco>
  <model>
    <compiler angle="degree" coordinate="local" inertiafromgeom="true"/>
    <option gravity="0 0 -9.81" integrator="RK4"/>

    <worldbody>
      <light diffuse=".5 .5 .5" pos="0 0 3" dir="0 0 -1"/>

      <body name="pendulum" pos="0 1 0">
        <joint name="hinge" type="hinge" axis="0 0 1" damping="0" friction="0"/>
        <!-- Rod: massless, length 0.2485m -->
        <geom name="rod" type="capsule" fromto="0 0 0 0.2485 0 0" size="0.001" mass="0" contype="0" conaffinity="0"/>
        <!-- Bob: sphere, diameter 0.1m, mass 1kg -->
        <body name="bob" pos="0.2485 0 0">
          <geom name="bob_geom" type="sphere" size="0.05" mass="1.0"/>
        </body>
      </body>
    </worldbody>

    <equality>
      <!-- Energy computation can be tracked via sensors -->
    </equality>

    <sensor>
      <jointpos joint="hinge"/>
      <jointvel joint="hinge"/>
    </sensor>
  </model>
</mujoco>

<mujoco>
  <compiler angle="degree" coordinate="local" inertiafromgeom="true"/>
  <option gravity="0 -9.81 0" integrator="RK4"/>

  <worldbody>
    <light diffuse=".5 .5 .5" pos="0 0 3" dir="0 0 -1"/>

    <body name="pendulum" pos="0 1 0">
      <joint name="hinge" type="hinge" axis="0 0 1" damping="0" friction="0"/>
      <!-- Rod: massless, length 0.2485m. Positioned from hinge. -->
      <geom name="rod" type="capsule" fromto="0 0 0 0.2485 0 0" size="0.001" mass="0" contype="0" conaffinity="0"/>
      
      <!-- Bob: sphere, diameter 0.1m (radius 0.05m), mass 1kg. 
           Positioned at the end of the rod. 
           Initial angle +90 degrees from vertical (which is +y).
           Since vertical is +y, and +x is right, 90 deg from +y towards +x is +x.
           Wait, vertical is +y. Hinge is at [0, 1, 0]. 
           If it starts horizontal (+x direction), the bob should be at [0.2485, 1, 0].
           The body 'bob' is relative to 'pendulum' body.
           If pendulum body is at [0, 1, 0], and we want bob at [0.2485, 1, 0], 
           then the bob body pos should be [0.2485, 0, 0].
      -->
      <body name="bob" pos="0.2485 0 0">
        <geom name="bob_geom" type="sphere" size="0.05" mass="1.0"/>
      </body>
    </body>
  </worldbody>

  <!-- To enable energy computation, we can use a sensor or just rely on the physics engine.
       MuJoCo provides energy via the 'mj_computeEnergy' function.
       In XML, we can add a sensor to track it if needed, but 'enable energy computation' 
       usually refers to the engine's ability. -->
</mujoco>

<mujoco>
  <compiler angle="degree" coordinate="local" inertiafromgeom="true"/>
  <option gravity="0 -9.81 0" integrator="RK4"/>

  <worldbody>
    <light diffuse=".5 .5 .5" pos="0 0 3" dir="0 0 -1"/>

    <body name="pendulum" pos="0 1 0">
      <joint name="hinge" type="hinge" axis="0 0 1" damping="0" friction="0"/>
      <!-- Rod: massless, length 0.2485m. -->
      <geom name="rod" type="capsule" fromto="0 0 0 0.2485 0 0" size="0.001" mass="0" contype="0" conaffinity="0"/>
      
      <body name="bob" pos="0.2485 0 0">
        <geom name="bob_geom" type="sphere" size="0.05" mass="1.0"/>
      </body>
    </body>
  </worldbody>
</mujoco>
